---
title: "flat_long_term_trends.Rmd"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r development, include=FALSE}
library(testthat)
```

```{r development-load}
# Load already included functions if relevant
pkgload::load_all(export_all = FALSE)
```

# safe_gam
    
```{r function-safe_gam}
#' Title
#' 
#' p_value < 0.05 : effet significatif de l’année.
#' edf ≈ 1 : tendance quasi linéaire.
#' edf > 1.5–2 : trajectoire non linéaire, donc potentiellement plus intéressante que le simple Mann-Kendall.
#' deviance_explained : part de variabilité expliquée par le modèle.
#' 
#' @param df 
#'
#' @return
#' 
#' @noRd
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(mgcv)
library(rlang)
library(tibble)

safe_gam <- function(df,
                     response_col = "RESULTAT",
                     year_col = "year",
                     k_max = 6,
                     min_n = 6,
                     min_years = 6) {
  
  response_sym <- sym(response_col)
  year_sym <- sym(year_col)
  
  df_mod <- df |>
    filter(
      !is.na(!!response_sym),
      !is.na(!!year_sym)
    ) |>
    arrange(!!year_sym)
  
  n_obs <- nrow(df_mod)
  n_years <- n_distinct(df_mod[[year_col]])
  
  if (n_obs < min_n || n_years < min_years) {
    return(tibble(
      n = n_obs,
      n_years = n_years,
      edf = NA_real_,
      F = NA_real_,
      p_value = NA_real_,
      deviance_explained = NA_real_,
      trend_type = "not tested"
    ))
  }
  
  k_use <- min(k_max, n_years - 1)
  
  if (k_use < 3) {
    return(tibble(
      n = n_obs,
      n_years = n_years,
      edf = NA_real_,
      F = NA_real_,
      p_value = NA_real_,
      deviance_explained = NA_real_,
      trend_type = "not tested"
    ))
  }
  
  formula_gam <- as.formula(
    paste0(response_col, " ~ s(", year_col, ", k = ", k_use, ")")
  )
  
  mod <- tryCatch(
    mgcv::gam(
      formula_gam,
      data = df_mod,
      method = "REML"
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  
  if (is.null(mod)) {
    return(tibble(
      n = n_obs,
      n_years = n_years,
      edf = NA_real_,
      F = NA_real_,
      p_value = NA_real_,
      deviance_explained = NA_real_,
      trend_type = "model failed"
    ))
  }
  
  sm <- summary(mod)
  
  edf <- sm$s.table[1, "edf"]
  F_value <- sm$s.table[1, "F"]
  p_value <- sm$s.table[1, "p-value"]
  dev_exp <- sm$dev.expl
  
  trend_type <- case_when(
    is.na(p_value) ~ "not tested",
    p_value >= 0.05 ~ "no significant temporal pattern",
    p_value < 0.05 & edf <= 1.5 ~ "linear / monotonic temporal trend",
    p_value < 0.05 & edf > 1.5 ~ "non-linear temporal pattern"
  )
  
  gam_results <- tibble(
    n = n_obs,
    n_years = n_years,
    edf = edf,
    F = F_value,
    p_value = p_value,
    deviance_explained = dev_exp,
    trend_type = trend_type
  )
  
  return(gam_results)
}
```

# run_gam_by_parameter

```{r function-run_gam_by_parameter}
#' Title
#' 
#' Description
#' 
#' @param data 
#' @param response_col character, name of the column containing measurements values
#' @param year_col character, name of the column containing years
#' @param group_vars vector of characters, groupin variables
#' @param all_group_combinations logical, TRUE test all combinations of the different variables from group_vars, FALSE test only with the combination of the group_vars given
#' @param k_max 
#' @param min_n 
#' @param min_years 
#'
#' @return
#' 
#' @export
run_gam_by_parameter <- function(data,
                                 response_col = "RESULTAT",
                                 parameter_col = "PARAMETRE_LIBELLE",
                                 year_col = "year",
                                 group_vars = c("estuary", "haline_zone", "season"),
                                 all_group_combinations = FALSE,
                                 k_max = 6,
                                 min_n = 6,
                                 min_years = 6) {
  
  parameter_sym <- sym(parameter_col)
  
  # Vérifications simples
  required_cols <- c(parameter_col, year_col, response_col, group_vars)
  missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(data))
  
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop(
      "Colonnes absentes du tableau : ",
      paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")
    )
  }
  
  # Crée les combinaisons de variables de groupement si demandé
  if (all_group_combinations) {
    
    grouping_list <- map(
      seq_along(group_vars),
      ~ combn(group_vars, .x, simplify = FALSE)
    ) |>
      flatten()
    
  } else {
    
    grouping_list <- list(group_vars)
  }
  
  map_dfr(grouping_list, function(current_group_vars) {
    
    grouping_syms <- syms(c(parameter_col, current_group_vars))
    
    data |>
      group_by(!!!grouping_syms) |>
      nest() |>
      mutate(
        gam_stats = map(
          data,
          ~ safe_gam(
            df = .x,
            response_col = response_col,
            year_col = year_col,
            k_max = k_max,
            min_n = min_n,
            min_years = min_years
          )
        ),
        grouping = paste(current_group_vars, collapse = " + ")
      ) |>
      select(-data) |>
      unnest(gam_stats)
  })
}
```

# get_group_vars_from_grouping
    
```{r function-get_group_vars_from_grouping}
#' Tranform characters separated by "+" in a vector of characters
#' 
#' @return vector of characters
#' 
#' @noRd
get_group_vars_from_grouping <- function(grouping) {
  
  if (is.null(grouping) || is.na(grouping)) {
    return(character(0))
  }
  
  grouping |>
    stringr::str_split("\\s*\\+\\s*") |>
    purrr::pluck(1)
}
```
  
# auto_plot_layout
  
```{r function-auto_plot_layout}
#' Create a layout automatically
#' 
#' It determines what to set for `colour`, `facet_rows` and `facet_cols` based on the variables present in `grouping`.
#' 
#' @return
#' 
#' @noRd
auto_plot_layout <- function(group_vars) {
  
  n_vars <- length(group_vars)
  
  if (n_vars == 0) {
    return(list(
      colour_var = NULL,
      facet_rows = NULL,
      facet_cols = NULL
    ))
  }
  
  if (n_vars == 1) {
    return(list(
      colour_var = group_vars[1],
      facet_rows = NULL,
      facet_cols = NULL
    ))
  }
  
  if (n_vars == 2) {
    return(list(
      colour_var = group_vars[2],
      facet_rows = NULL,
      facet_cols = group_vars[1]
    ))
  }
  
  if (n_vars >= 3) {
    return(list(
      colour_var = group_vars[3],
      facet_rows = group_vars[1],
      facet_cols = group_vars[2]
    ))
  }
}
```
  

# plot_trend_one_parameter

```{r function-plot_trend_one_parameter}
#' Graph function for time-series of one parameter
#' 
#' Description
#' 
#' @return ggplot
#' 
#' @noRd
plot_trend_one_parameter <- function(data,
                                     gam_results,
                                     parameter_value,
                                     response_col = "RESULTAT",
                                     x_col = "year_month",
                                     parameter_col = "PARAMETRE_LIBELLE",
                                     grouping = NULL,
                                     colour_var = NULL,
                                     facet_rows = NULL,
                                     facet_cols = NULL,
                                     auto_layout = TRUE,
                                     point_alpha = 0.5,
                                     point_size = 1,
                                     smooth = TRUE,
                                     smooth_method = "gam",
                                     smooth_formula = y ~ s(x, k = 6),
                                     symbol_linear = "▲",
                                     symbol_nonlinear = "●",
                                     symbol_size = 5) {
  
  # Sécurité alpha
  point_alpha <- as.numeric(point_alpha)[1]
  if (is.na(point_alpha)) point_alpha <- 0.5
  
  # Si grouping non fourni, on essaie de le déduire automatiquement
  if (is.null(grouping) && "grouping" %in% names(gam_results)) {
    unique_grouping <- unique(gam_results$grouping)
    unique_grouping <- unique_grouping[!is.na(unique_grouping)]
    
    if (length(unique_grouping) == 1) {
      grouping <- unique_grouping
    }
  }
  
  group_vars <- get_group_vars_from_grouping(grouping)
  
  if (auto_layout && length(group_vars) > 0) {
    
    layout <- auto_plot_layout(group_vars)
    
    if (is.null(colour_var)) {
      colour_var <- layout$colour_var
    }
    
    if (is.null(facet_rows)) {
      facet_rows <- layout$facet_rows
    }
    
    if (is.null(facet_cols)) {
      facet_cols <- layout$facet_cols
    }
  }
  
  join_vars <- c(parameter_col, group_vars)
  
  data_param <- data |>
    filter(.data[[parameter_col]] == parameter_value) |>
    filter(!is.na(.data[[response_col]]), !is.na(.data[[x_col]]))
  
  if (nrow(data_param) == 0) {
    warning("Aucune donnée pour le paramètre : ", parameter_value)
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  gam_param <- gam_results |>
    filter(.data[[parameter_col]] == parameter_value)
  
  if (!is.null(grouping) && "grouping" %in% names(gam_param)) {
    gam_param <- gam_param |>
      filter(.data[["grouping"]] == grouping)
  }
  
  gam_symbols <- gam_param |>
    mutate(
      trend_symbol = case_when(
        stringr::str_detect(
          trend_type,
          stringr::regex("non-linear", ignore_case = TRUE)
        ) &
          !stringr::str_detect(
            trend_type,
            stringr::regex("no significant", ignore_case = TRUE)
          ) ~ symbol_nonlinear,
        
        stringr::str_detect(
          trend_type,
          stringr::regex("linear|monotonic", ignore_case = TRUE)
        ) &
          !stringr::str_detect(
            trend_type,
            stringr::regex("no significant", ignore_case = TRUE)
          ) ~ symbol_linear,
        
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    ) |>
    filter(!is.na(trend_symbol))
  
  # Dernier point observé de chaque série
  if (length(group_vars) > 0) {
    
    last_points <- data_param |>
      group_by(across(all_of(group_vars))) |>
      arrange(.data[[x_col]], .by_group = TRUE) |>
      slice_tail(n = 1) |>
      ungroup()
    
  } else {
    
    last_points <- data_param |>
      arrange(.data[[x_col]]) |>
      slice_tail(n = 1)
  }
  
  # Jointure avec les résultats GAM
  if (length(group_vars) > 0 && all(join_vars %in% names(gam_symbols))) {
    
    last_points <- last_points |>
      left_join(
        gam_symbols |>
          select(all_of(join_vars), trend_type, trend_symbol),
        by = join_vars
      ) |>
      filter(!is.na(trend_symbol))
    
  } else if (nrow(gam_symbols) > 0) {
    
    last_points <- last_points |>
      mutate(
        trend_type = gam_symbols$trend_type[1],
        trend_symbol = gam_symbols$trend_symbol[1]
      ) |>
      filter(!is.na(trend_symbol))
    
  } else {
    
    last_points <- last_points |>
      mutate(
        trend_type = NA_character_,
        trend_symbol = NA_character_
      ) |>
      filter(!is.na(trend_symbol))
  }
  
  # ------------------------------------------------------------------
  # ggplot robuste
  # ------------------------------------------------------------------
  
  if (is.null(colour_var)) {
    
    p <- ggplot(
      data_param,
      aes(
        x = .data[[x_col]],
        y = .data[[response_col]]
      )
    )
    
  } else {
    
    p <- ggplot(
      data_param,
      aes(
        x = .data[[x_col]],
        y = .data[[response_col]],
        colour = .data[[colour_var]]
      )
    )
  }
  
  p <- p +
    geom_point(
      alpha = point_alpha,
      size = point_size
    )
  
  if (smooth) {
    p <- p +
      geom_smooth(
        method = smooth_method,
        formula = smooth_formula,
        se = TRUE
      )
  }
  
  # Symboles de tendance
  if (nrow(last_points) > 0) {
    
    if (is.null(colour_var)) {
      
      p <- p +
        geom_text(
          data = last_points,
          aes(
            x = .data[[x_col]],
            y = .data[[response_col]],
            label = trend_symbol
          ),
          size = symbol_size,
          vjust = -0.8,
          show.legend = FALSE
        )
      
    } else {
      
      p <- p +
        geom_text(
          data = last_points,
          aes(
            x = .data[[x_col]],
            y = .data[[response_col]],
            label = trend_symbol,
            colour = .data[[colour_var]]
          ),
          size = symbol_size,
          vjust = -0.8,
          show.legend = FALSE
        )
    }
  }
    
  # Facettes
  if (!is.null(facet_rows) || !is.null(facet_cols)) {
    
    rows <- if (!is.null(facet_rows)) vars(!!sym(facet_rows)) else vars()
    cols <- if (!is.null(facet_cols)) vars(!!sym(facet_cols)) else vars()
    
    p <- p +
      facet_grid(
        rows = rows,
        cols = cols,
        scales = "free_y"
      )
  }
  
  p +
    labs(
      title = parameter_value,
      x = x_col,
      y = response_col,
      colour = colour_var
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey95"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
}
```

# plot_trends_by_parameter
    
```{r function-plot_trends_by_parameter}
#' Automate graph function for time-series across all parameters
#' 
#' Description
#' 
#' @return list of ggplots
#' 
#' @export
plot_trends_by_parameter <- function(data,
                                     gam_results,
                                     response_col = "RESULTAT",
                                     x_col = "year_month",
                                     parameter_col = "PARAMETRE_LIBELLE",
                                     grouping = NULL,
                                     colour_var = NULL,
                                     facet_rows = NULL,
                                     facet_cols = NULL,
                                     auto_layout = TRUE,
                                     ...) {
  
  # Déduction automatique du grouping si un seul existe dans gam_results
  if (is.null(grouping) && "grouping" %in% names(gam_results)) {
    
    unique_grouping <- unique(gam_results$grouping)
    unique_grouping <- unique_grouping[!is.na(unique_grouping)]
    
    if (length(unique_grouping) == 1) {
      grouping <- unique_grouping
    }
  }
  
  parameters <- data |>
    distinct(.data[[parameter_col]]) |>
    arrange(.data[[parameter_col]]) |>
    pull(.data[[parameter_col]])
  
  plots <- parameters |>
    set_names() |>
    map(
      ~ plot_trend_one_parameter(
        data = data,
        gam_results = gam_results,
        parameter_value = .x,
        response_col = response_col,
        x_col = x_col,
        parameter_col = parameter_col,
        grouping = grouping,
        colour_var = colour_var,
        facet_rows = facet_rows,
        facet_cols = facet_cols,
        auto_layout = auto_layout,
        ...
      )
    )
  
  plots
}
```
  
# Inflate  
  
```{r development-inflate, eval=FALSE}
# Run but keep eval=FALSE to avoid infinite loop
# Execute in the console directly
fusen::inflate(flat_file = "dev/flat_long_term_trends.Rmd", 
               vignette_name = NULL, overwrite = TRUE, check = FALSE)
```
